accessNotes.en: Oi piges topothetoun tin Toska 5-6 chlm. dytika tis Kavalas, me prosvasi meso yperastikou leoforeiou pros Nea Peramo kai dorean choro stathmevsis. I eisodos stin organomeni plaz anaferetai os ticketed/me eisitirio.
accessNotes.gr: Οι πηγές τοποθετούν την Τόσκα 5-6 χλμ. δυτικά της Καβάλας, με πρόσβαση μέσω υπεραστικού λεωφορείου προς Νέα Πέραμο και δωρεάν χώρο στάθμευσης. Η είσοδος στην οργανωμένη πλαζ αναφέρεται ως ticketed/με εισιτήριο.

waterDepth.notes: Δεν βρέθηκε direct source-backed επιβεβαίωση για ρηχά ή βαθιά νερά στην Τόσκα, οπότε το βάθος κρατιέται συντηρητικά ουδέτερο. Δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AM 2026-06-02: Visit Kavala, Blue Flag Greece direct page, Tosca direct page, Oceanis and Kavala municipal accessibility PDF support Toska/Tosca Beach identity, Kavala municipality location, Blue Flag 2026 award, sandy beach, organized beach context, hotel/beach facility setting, bus access, parking, bar/restaurant/refreshment context, changing rooms, showers and trees/pine-forest shade context. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AM static metadata: unsupported shallow-water metadata was neutralized to medium/normal because no direct depth source was found; Visit Kavala explicitly lists sea activities as no, so snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source wording about clean/serene/protected/clear waters, if present, was not imported into windProfile, scoring or live condition claims.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 audit 2026-05-25: kept beach bar; Visit Kavala and Alana source support beach bars at Nea Iraklitsa.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BH 2026-06-02: Visit Kavala official page and Blue Flag Greece direct page support Nea Iraklitsa identity in Kavala / Paggeo, sandy organized beach context, village/harbour setting, free entry, free parking area, changing rooms, showers, cafe/bar, tavernas, beach bars/Alana, beach volley and beach tennis, sea/water-sports context, rooms-for-rent context, bus access via the Nea Peramos route and current 2026 Blue Flag entry. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass BH static metadata: unsupported fine-sand specificity and shallow-water certainty were neutralized because the reviewed direct sources document sandy beach character but not exact grain size, beach slope or stable shallow-water behavior. Unsupported app snorkeling/surfing flags are pinned false. Source wording about wonderful/turquoise seas or day-at-beach appeal was not imported into environment quiet, windProfile, scoring logic or live calm/protected/safe claims.

Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AJ static metadata: Visit Kavala supports fine white sand, access by KTEL/Nea Peramos and seasonal bus continuation, Blue Flag status, free entry, free parking area, changing rooms, showers, sea activities, cafe/bar and rooms-for-rent context. Gokavala and AllOverGreece support sandy shallow-water character, organized beach bars with sunbeds/umbrellas, showers, changing rooms, WC/toilet and water-sports context. Natural shade remains false; unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source popularity/party wording was not imported into recommendation scoring or live condition claims.

accessNotes.en: Oi piges topothetoun ton Vrasida anamesa stous Ammolofous kai ti Nea Peramo, sti chersoniso piso apo tin Anaktoroupoli. O dromos pros to akrotirio xekina apo tin eisodo tou kastrou kai perigrafetai os chomatodromos se schetika kali katastasi, prosvasimos apo ta perissotera ochimata.
accessNotes.gr: Οι πηγές τοποθετούν τον Βρασίδα ανάμεσα στους Αμμόλοφους και τη Νέα Πέραμο, στη χερσόνησο πίσω από την Ανακτορούπολη. Ο δρόμος προς το ακρωτήριο ξεκινά από την είσοδο του κάστρου και περιγράφεται ως χωματόδρομος σε σχετικά καλή κατάσταση, προσβάσιμος από τα περισσότερα οχήματα.
accessNotes.fr: Oi piges topothetoun ton Vrasida anamesa stous Ammolofous kai ti Nea Peramo, sti chersoniso piso apo tin Anaktoroupoli. O dromos pros to akrotirio xekina apo tin eisodo tou kastrou kai perigrafetai os chomatodromos se schetika kali katastasi, prosvasimos apo ta perissotera ochimata.

accessNotes.it: Oi piges topothetoun ton Vrasida anamesa stous Ammolofous kai ti Nea Peramo, sti chersoniso piso apo tin Anaktoroupoli. O dromos pros to akrotirio xekina apo tin eisodo tou kastrou kai perigrafetai os chomatodromos se schetika kali katastasi, prosvasimos apo ta perissotera ochimata.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AQ 2026-06-02: Visit Kavala and Kavala accessibility guide support Cape Vrasidas identity/location between Ammolofoi and Nea Peramos, small beaches/coves, rocky formations, dirt-road access from the Anaktoroupolis/castle entrance, relatively good road condition usable by most vehicle types, free entry, free parking area, cafe/bar context and no Blue Flag/current accessibility/changing-room/shower/sea-activity claims. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AQ static metadata: Gokavala and Nikana support the non-organized beach character, sandy beach/fine-sand context, peninsula/behind-fortress identity and no sunbed/beach-bar service expectation. Unsupported deep-water metadata was neutralized to medium/normal, and unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source wording about clear/turquoise/quiet/private/calm scenery was not imported into windProfile, scoring or live condition claims.

accessNotes.gr: Η Ραψάνη βρίσκεται κεντρικά στην πόλη της Καβάλας, κοντά στο Δημοτικό Πάρκο Φαλήρου. Οι πηγές τεκμηριώνουν οδική πρόσβαση με ιδιωτικά μέσα και μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς, με αστικά λεωφορεία στις δημοτικές πηγές.

access.label: Αστική πρόσβαση και λεωφορεία
access.notes: Η Ραψάνη βρίσκεται κεντρικά στην πόλη της Καβάλας, κοντά στο Δημοτικό Πάρκο Φαλήρου. Οι πηγές τεκμηριώνουν οδική πρόσβαση με ιδιωτικά μέσα και μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς, με αστικά λεωφορεία στις δημοτικές πηγές.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα υδάτων κολύμβησης αναφέρει αβαθή νερά στα πρώτα μέτρα και ήπια κλίση πυθμένα, με την ισοβαθή των 5 μέτρων περίπου 100 μέτρα από την ακτή. Δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AP 2026-06-02: official bathing-water profile/PDF supports Rapsani 1 identity in Kavala municipality, location between Kalamitsa cape and Kavala port, south-facing 250 m urban sandy shore/seabed, shallow first metres with gentle seabed slope, full-length organized beach context, loungers, umbrellas, waste bins, WC, showers, nearby restaurants/refreshment facilities and road/private/public-transport access. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AP static metadata: Visit Kavala supports central location by Faliro Municipal Park, sand, shallow waters, showers, changing rooms, free entry, cafe/bar service and no parking/sea activities/accessible-infrastructure; municipal/Public Benefit sources support city-bus access and nearby taverna/cafeteria context. Current Blue Flag 2026 metadata was not added because the current Visit Kavala page lists Blue Flag as No despite older/general municipal material referencing past awards. Source exposure/wave/current/water-clarity wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or live condition claims.

accessNotes.en: I pigi Nikana perigrafei prosvasi pernontas apo ti Remvi: avtokinito mechri ena simeio kai meta perpatima/skalia pros tin paralia Psatha. To access menei moderate/easy-hike anti gia apli asfalto mechri tin akti.
accessNotes.gr: Η πηγή Nikana περιγράφει πρόσβαση περνώντας από τη Ρέμβη: αυτοκίνητο μέχρι ένα σημείο και μετά περπάτημα/σκαλιά προς την παραλία Ψάθα. Το access μένει moderate/easy-hike αντί για απλή άσφαλτο μέχρι την ακτή.

access.label: Πρόσβαση με σύντομο περπάτημα και σκαλιά
access.notes: Η πηγή Nikana περιγράφει πρόσβαση περνώντας από τη Ρέμβη: αυτοκίνητο μέχρι ένα σημείο και μετά περπάτημα/σκαλιά προς την παραλία Ψάθα. Το access μένει moderate/easy-hike αντί για απλή άσφαλτο μέχρι την ακτή.

waterDepth.label: Κανονικό βάθος
waterDepth.notes: Οι direct πηγές τεκμηριώνουν την ταυτότητα, την άμμο, την οργάνωση και την πρόσβαση, αλλά όχι ρηχά ή βαθιά νερά. Το βάθος κρατιέται συντηρητικά ουδέτερο και δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AS 2026-06-02: Nikana directly supports Psatha/Trita beach near Nea Iraklitsa, organized beach-bar context since 2016, umbrellas, sunbeds, fine sand, and access by passing Remvi with car access to one point followed by walking/stairs. OSM supports the same beach feature near the stored coordinates. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AS static metadata: Redblueguide and Aetoi support Psatha Beach Bar in Nea Iraklitsa/Kavala and static services such as beach bar, sunbeds, umbrellas, refreshment/cafe, drinks/cocktails, food and event context. Visit Kavala was used only as broad Nea Iraklitsa regional context. Unsupported asphalt-to-beach, shallow-water, parking, shower and changing-room claims were not added; unsupported depth stayed medium/normal, and unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source calm/protected/ideal/clear/quiet wording was not imported into environment quiet, windProfile, scoring or live condition claims.
